rephrased_requirement: Design and implement a secure, high-performance AI-powered file analysis and question-answering system, ensuring accurate responses to user queries.
functional_requirements: Users can upload files in various formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT) for analysis
Users can submit natural language queries related to the uploaded files
The system provides relevant and accurate responses to user queries based on the file content
The system supports multiple file uploads and query submissions
non_functional_requirements: The system responds to user queries within 5 seconds
The system supports a minimum of 100 concurrent users
The system achieves an accuracy rate of 90% or higher for query responses
security_requirements: All file uploads and query submissions are encrypted using HTTPS
User authentication and authorization are implemented to restrict access to uploaded files and query responses
The system complies with relevant data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA)
acceptance_criteria: The system correctly processes and responds to 90% of user queries within 5 seconds
The system maintains an accuracy rate of 90% or higher for query responses during load testing
The system passes security vulnerability testing and penetration testing
recommended_solution_approach: Utilize a cloud-based AI platform (e.g., Google Cloud AI Platform, Amazon SageMaker) with natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) capabilities, integrated with a secure file storage solution (e.g., AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage) and a robust authentication and authorization framework
open_questions: What is the expected volume of file uploads and user queries per hour?
What are the specific file formats and sizes that need to be supported?
Are there any specific NLP or ML models that need to be integrated or trained for this application?
